system: GROAN™ — Global Reef & Ocean Analytics Network
notes: v1.1 — removed GMAIN (not a GROAN module); physical/env DTIs routed to GKIN; interventions to DMAP-CAL™; outcomes to CMIE. Added 14 missing DTIs per GROAN spec.

CORAL_COVER_PCT.description: Live coral cover from belt transect (25m x 4m)

CCA_COVER_PCT.description: Crustose coralline algae cover — succession stage indicator

BARE_SUBSTRATE_PCT.description: Bare carbonate substrate from belt transect

SEDIMENT_COVER_PCT.description: Sediment cover on reef substrate — LBSP proxy

REEF_BLEACHING_PCT.description: Percentage of observed coral showing bleaching (pale, partial, or full)

REEF_CORAL_CONDITION.description: Dominant coral condition state at survey site

SUCCESSION_STAGE.description: Ecological succession stage — recovery index input to DMAP-CAL™

PAM_FV_FM.description: Fv/Fm quantum yield of PSII. Healthy: 0.55-0.65. Pre-bleach stress: <0.45. Severe dysfunction: <0.30. Must be measured <50 µmol PAR.

JUVENILE_CORAL_DENSITY_M2.description: Juvenile coral density (<4cm diameter) per m² — recruitment signal

HERBIVORE_BIOMASS_KG_HA.description: Herbivore functional group biomass (parrotfish + surgeonfish + urchins) from fish survey

APEX_PREDATOR_INDEX.description: Apex predator encounter rate normalized to circuit 1 baseline — trophic cascade trigger

LIONFISH_DENSITY_100M2.description: Lionfish density per 100m² — herbivore suppression signal distinct from overfishing

SCTLD_PREVALENCE_PCT.description: Stony Coral Tissue Loss Disease prevalence at survey site. Non-additive with thermal bleaching — must be logged separately in CMIE.

ALGAE_CONTACT_MARGIN_M.description: Total algae-coral contact margin length per transect — allelopathy zone proxy

SEAGRASS_COVER_PCT.description: Seagrass meadow cover in lagoon/back-reef zone

SEAGRASS_HEALTH_INDEX.description: Composite seagrass health — blade density, rhizome architecture, sediment condition

SEAGRASS_CARBON_BURIAL_INDEX.description: Biological pump efficiency proxy — sediment darkness, rhizome intact, no bioturbation

MANGROVE_DOC_EXPORT_INDEX.description: Estimated DOC export capacity to adjacent seagrass/reef — derived from canopy area

WATER_TEMP_C.description: Absolute sea surface or water column temperature

WATER_TEMP_ANOMALY_C.description: SST anomaly vs. site MMM (Maximum Monthly Mean) baseline. >+1°C for >4 weeks triggers Sverdrup NPP flag.

OMEGA_ARAGONITE.description: Aragonite saturation state. Monitor: 2.5-3.5. Alert: 1.5-2.5. Critical/tipping: <1.5 (net negative accretion trigger).

NUTRIENT_NP_RATIO.description: DIN:DIP ratio vs. Redfield baseline 16:1. >20 = anthropogenic N loading (Tier 2 LBSP). <8 = N-cycling perturbation (GKIN flag).

NUTRIENT_DIN_UML.description: Dissolved inorganic nitrogen (NH4+ + NO2- + NO3-). Sample must be preserved within 30 min.

NUTRIENT_DIP_UML.description: Dissolved inorganic phosphorus (PO4³⁻). Sample must be preserved within 30 min.

SECCHI_DEPTH_M.description: Secchi disk depth — turbidity proxy, concurrent with water chemistry sampling

VISIBILITY_M.description: Horizontal underwater visibility at survey depth

WAVE_HEIGHT_M.description: Significant wave height (Hs) — Source 002. Visual Beaufort estimate or instrument.

THERMOCLINE_DEPTH_M.description: Thermocline depth (max dT/dz) from CTD profile. <50m triggers DVM compression flag.

TIDAL_PHASE_COMPLIANCE.description: Survey tidal phase vs. circuit 1 anchor (±1hr). Non-compliant data cannot enter longitudinal cover trend.

IMAGE_CONFIDENCE_TIER.description: GSIN image confidence tier assigned at ingestion. High>85%, Moderate 60-85%, Low<60%.

OBSERVER_PAIR_CALIBRATED.description: Observer pair calibration status from Banco Chinchorro standard transect. Uncertified data not accepted into pipeline.

CMIE_CASCADE_FLAG.description: Cross-module interaction signal type. Multiple flags allowed per site per circuit.

CMIE_PHASE_SHIFT_PROXIMITY.description: Proximity to coral-algae phase shift threshold (0=low risk, 1=imminent). Weighted by hysteresis asymmetry.

CMIE_RESILIENCE_INDEX.description: Estimated reef resilience — rate of recovery between disturbance events across circuits.

CMIE_RESISTANCE_INDEX.description: Estimated reef resistance — magnitude of disturbance survived without phase shift.

COVER_TRAJECTORY.description: Multi-circuit coral cover trajectory. Requires ≥2 circuits. Overrides status-only DS for routing.

DS_SCORE.description: Decision Score: DS = α·E[Benefit] − β·Risk − γ·Cost + δ·Feasibility

DS_LOCAL_DRIVER_PCT.description: Percentage of DS driven by locally actionable stressors (Tier 1-4). Critical for intervention ROI calculation.

INTERVENTION_TYPE.description: Specific DMAP-CAL™ intervention — prefixed by tier for routing clarity. Tier 5 = climate/global only.

OUTCOME_TIME_DAYS.description: Expected time to measurable outcome from intervention initiation
